prestazioni: Engine swap to a **EN07X** (660cc turbocharged Kei-car engine) with a **Garrett GT12 turbocharger** (40mm compressor wheel, 52mm turbine) and **HKS Super Power Flow Type-R exhaust manifold** to optimize spool for the tiny displacement. Pair with a **TODA Racing forged crankshaft** (87mm stroke) and **JE 8.5:1 compression pistons** to handle 1.5 bar of boost safely.

Full **Link G4+ Xtreme ECU** standalone management with **ID1000x injectors** (side-feed, Kei-car specific) and a **Walbro 255lph in-tank fuel pump** to support 200+ hp on E85. Custom **Tomioka Racing camshafts** (272° duration, 11.5mm lift) for high-RPM power while maintaining drivability.

**KYB AGX adjustable coilovers** (valved specifically for the Stella’s **GF1 chassis**) with **Cusco 22mm front sway bar** and **Hardrace adjustable rear toe arms** to eliminate the stock understeer. **Project Mu B-Spec brake pads** and **DBA 4000 Series rotors** (ventilated, 240mm front) for Kei-car weight stopping power.
estetica: **Varis Japan Kei-car widebody kit** (Stella-specific, 100mm fender flares) with **C-West front bumper** (carbon fiber, integrated tow hook) and **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (vented, 30% weight reduction).
**Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels** (15x7 +38 offset, 4x100 PCD) wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires** (195/45/15) for maximum grip. **Rays Gram Lights 57C center caps** for JDM authenticity.

**RE Amemiya rear wing** (2-piece, carbon fiber, 800mm span) with **C-West side skirts** (polyurethane, bolt-on) and **LED taillights from JDM Stella R model** (clear lens, sequential turn signals). **Full Respray in Subaru Sonic Blue Pearl** (code: 22B) with **3M Matte Black vinyl roof wrap**.
